mapper.insert: INSERT INTO uc_car_real_time_current ( user_phone, car_license, current_pile, real_speed, driving_direction, lane_number, report_time ) VALUES ( #{item.userPhone}, #{item.carLicense}, #{item.currentPile}, #{item.realSpeed}, #{item.drivingDirection}, #{item.laneNumber}, #{item.reportTime} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE current_pile = VALUES(current_pile), real_speed = VALUES(real_speed), driving_direction = VALUES(driving_direction), lane_number = VALUES(lane_number), report_time = VALUES(report_time)
